analysis_result: Median PFS for MPNST-G2 = 1.39 years (95% CI: 0.90 - inf; upper bound undefined because the KM estimate plateaus at S=0.457 and is censored above 0.5 at the end of follow-up).
denominator_used: N = 8 MPNST_G2 samples from MOESM10 sheet 'Fig 1b' (3 recurrence events, 5 censored).
assumptions_made: Used 'Time to Recurrence or Last Follow Up' (years) as the time variable and 'Recurrence' (1=event, 0=censored) as the event indicator; interpreted PFS as time to recurrence or last follow-up per the source-data column naming; fit a standard Kaplan-Meier curve with lifelines (no delayed entry / left-truncation applied because follow-up is measured from a single anchor in the source data); median defined as the smallest t for which S(t) <= 0.5 (Brookmeyer-Crowley); given only 3 events among 8 patients the KM curve reaches a minimum of S=0.457 at t=1.39 years, so the median is reported as 1.39 years with upper 95% CI = infinity (unbounded).
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - File: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM10_ESM.xlsx, sheet 'Fig 1b' (75 rows, 3 columns).
   - Columns: Methylation_Group, Recurrence (0/1), Time to Recurrence or Last Follow Up (years).
   - Methylation_Group distribution: PremalignantNF_G3=29, Benign_NF-G4=20, Sporadic Spinal NF_G5=10, MPNST_G1=8, MPNST_G2=8.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Filter: Methylation_Group == 'MPNST_G2' -> N=8.
   - Event counts: Recurrence=1 in 3 samples; Recurrence=0 in 5 samples.

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Duration column: 'Time to Recurrence or Last Follow Up' (years, numeric).
   - Event column: 'Recurrence' (1=recurrence event, 0=censored).
   - MPNST_G2 rows (time, event): (0.90,1), (1.39,1), (1.31,0), (1.16,1), (10.67,0), (0.82,0), (6.93,0), (0.91,0).

D. COMPUTATION
   - Method: lifelines.KaplanMeierFitter().fit(durations, event_observed) with no delayed entry.
   - Survival function values:
       t=0.82 -> S=1.000
       t=0.90 -> S=0.857 (event)
       t=0.91 -> S=0.857 (censor)
       t=1.16 -> S=0.686 (event)
       t=1.31 -> S=0.686 (censor)
       t=1.39 -> S=0.457 (event)  <- first t with S<=0.5
       t=6.93 -> S=0.457 (censor)
       t=10.67 -> S=0.457 (censor)
   - 95% CI for median from Brookmeyer-Crowley: (0.90, inf).

E. RESULT
   - Median PFS for MPNST-G2 = 1.39 years (95% CI 0.90 to inf; upper bound undefined because S plateaus above 0 and never re-crosses 0.5 within follow-up).

F. CAVEATS
   - Small sample (N=8, only 3 events); Kaplan-Meier median is unstable with so few events.
   - The median is reported as the first time point at which S<=0.5; the upper 95% CI is infinite because survival remains censored above 0.5 at the longest observation.
   - No left-truncation adjustment applied; assumes all patients are at risk from t=0 of the reported follow-up clock.
   - PFS here is operationalized as time to recurrence (or censoring at last follow-up) using the source-data columns as provided.
